name: Redox Limited
analysis: RDX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.6900. Trade idea: entry A$3.6900, stop A$2.9106, target A$6.0282 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
